definition.title: LHS Apparel & Merch (Identity + Revenue + Prompt Engine)
definition.objective: Creative laboratory + revenue experiment + engagement engine. Gives Anj creative freedom. Apparel hype posts, mockup teasers, design voting polls, 'Should we print this?' posts. Keeps engagement fresh.
definition.target_audience: Drivers (primary), trucker wives/families, fleet operators, LHS members, general trucking community fans
definition.cadence: 1-2 times per month minimum. Spike during launch windows. Tie into bigger campaigns. Quarterly capsule drop planning.

campaign_card.target_audience: Drivers (primary), trucker wives/families, fleet operators, LHS members, general trucking community fans
campaign_card.campaign_name: LHS Apparel & Merch (Identity + Revenue + Prompt Engine)
key_messages: Apparel is identity signaling and community building — not just merch
Apparel Prompt Engine generates production-ready AI mockups at zero friction
Must feel cool, insider, elevated — culture not merch hustle

initiatives: AI mockup prompts for lifestyle shots. Campaign tie-ins. Engagement levers (polls, preorders). Sub-sections: current items, archived concept

_legacy_card.description: Apparel is not merch — it is identity signaling, community building, revenue testing, cultural leverage, and social media fuel. Three core functions: Identity Amplification, Social Media Fuel, Revenue Generation.
_legacy_card.strategic_purpose: Creative laboratory + revenue experiment + engagement engine. Gives Anj creative freedom. Apparel hype posts, mockup teasers, design voting polls, 'Should we print this?' posts. Keeps engagement fresh.
_legacy_card.pre_approved_angles: AI mockup drops. Limited run announcements. Driver wife angle. Design voting polls. Gift box teasers. Seasonal tie-ins.
_legacy_card.artlist_cost: Minimal for AI-generated mockups. Print-on-demand costs separate from content budget.
_legacy_card.repurposing: AI mockup prompts for lifestyle shots. Campaign tie-ins. Engagement levers (polls, preorders). Sub-sections: current items, archived concepts, prompt templates, drop calendar.
_legacy_card.timeline: 1-2 times per month minimum. Spike during launch windows. Tie into bigger campaigns. Quarterly capsule drop planning.
